---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or an enhancement to an existing one
title: ''
labels: enhancement
---

## The problem

What you're trying to do that chill-out makes hard, awkward, or impossible today. Concrete scenarios beat abstract
"it would be nice if..." phrasing.

## A solution you have in mind

How you'd like chill-out to behave. Sketch the CLI flag, config field, API call, or output change you're imagining.
Rough is fine; we'll iterate.

## Alternatives you've considered

Other tools, workarounds, or chill-out features you tried that didn't fit. Helps us understand the shape of the gap.

## Additional context

Anything else relevant: links to similar features in other tools, related issues, or constraints from your environment.
